language.label: Interface language
language.description: Changes client menus, buttons, and messages without rewriting conversations or assistant content.

assistantActions.hiddenDescription: Hidden assistants are removed from the assistant sidebar and assistant or conversation search. Showing them again preserves existing conversations.
assistantActions.deleteConfirm: Delete “{{name}}”? This permanently removes its {{count}} conversation(s) and related data and cannot be undone.
assistantActions.keepOneVisible: At least one assistant must remain visible. Show another assistant before continuing.

app.defaultSpaceDescription: The default space for general assistants, conversation history, and shared knowledge
app.apiKeyRequired: Add an API key for {{provider}} to get started.
app.quoteMessage: Quote selected text or the whole message
app.uploadAttachmentDetailed: Upload images, PDF, Word, text, and other files
app.noConversationDescription: Choose a prompt below or enter what you want to work on.
app.webSearchEnabled: Web search enabled; results will be retrieved when you send

conversationSearch.title: Smart conversation search
conversationSearch.placeholder: Describe a topic, question, person, or conclusion you remember
conversationSearch.searching: Understanding your query and searching conversations...
conversationSearch.emptyDescription: Try describing the goal or conclusion you discussed at the time.

spaces.title: Space center
spaces.guidance: Spaces separate data for different contexts. Switching spaces changes the assistants, conversations, knowledge, and memories you see.
spaces.isolatedContentDescription: Each space keeps its own conversations, assistant settings, local knowledge, and assistant memories.
spaces.sharedSettingsDescription: Model providers, API keys, app preferences, and updates remain global.
spaces.useCasesDescription: Separate work, personal, client, study, research, or team contexts.
spaces.switchNote: You are using “{{space}}”. Choose Switch below to enter another space without deleting data from this one.
spaces.createDescription: G-LLM switches to the new space after it is created.
spaces.defaultLogoDescription: The default G-LLM space uses a fixed logo that cannot be changed.
spaces.logoDescription: A simple square image or transparent background works best.
spaces.optionalLogoDescription: Optional. A simple square image or transparent background works best.
spaces.name: Space name
spaces.workspaceOptional: Optional; you can link one later
spaces.workspaceDescription: G-LLM writes to this folder only after you confirm a local task. macOS may request permission on first access.
spaces.localPathDescription: The folder path stays on this device and is not sent to your model provider.

errors.chooseWorkspace: Could not choose a workspace folder
errors.imageOnly: Choose an image file for the space logo
errors.imageTooLarge: The space logo must be no larger than 8 MB
errors.imageRead: Could not read the space logo

assistantSettings.title: Assistant settings
assistantSettings.avatarDescription: Uploaded images are centered and cropped to a square. Use zoom to adjust the framing.
assistantSettings.name: Assistant name
assistantSettings.promptNote: Updated instructions apply to future requests from this assistant. Existing responses are not rewritten.
assistantSettings.previewReady: Avatar preview ready; save to apply it
assistantSettings.promptRestored: Built-in instructions restored; save to apply them
assistantSettings.avatarRestored: Default icon restored; save to apply it

errors.imageOnly: Choose an image file for the assistant avatar
errors.imageTooLarge: The avatar image must be no larger than 8 MB
errors.imageRead: Could not read the avatar image
errors.cropUnavailable: Avatar cropping is not available in this environment

addAssistant.searchPlaceholder: Search: family doctor, contract review, social post writer...

addAssistant.empty: No preset matched. You can generate a new assistant with AI.

conversationModel.title: Conversation model
conversationModel.note: This setting applies only to “{{conversation}}”. Assistant default: {{provider}} · {{model}}
conversationModel.defaultApplied: Conversation now uses the assistant default: {{model}}

knowledge.title: Knowledge and memory
knowledge.emptyKnowledge: This assistant has no saved knowledge
knowledge.emptyMemory: This assistant has no long-term memories
knowledge.memoryPlaceholder: Add something this assistant should remember, such as your response preferences, company name, or review priorities.
knowledge.referenced: Quoted “{{title}}”. It will appear in the composer after you close this window.

tools.title: Extension settings
tools.note: Configure extensions that models can call: function tools, MCP services, and external plugins. Attachments, screenshots, knowledge, and web search remain available as separate composer controls.
tools.name: Tool name
tools.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the tool for yourself and the model, for example: Look up a CRM customer by phone number.

notices.clipboardTextUnreadable: Clipboard attachments added; text could not be extracted from some files

notices.knowledgeReferenced: Quoted “{{title}}” as context for your next message

notices.answerWithQuote: Answer using the conversation content I quoted.

attachments.imageVisualInput: Will be sent as visual input

workspaceErrors.status429: The model service is busy (429) and did not recover after retrying.
workspaceErrors.status502: The model gateway could not reach the upstream service (502) after retrying.

workspaceErrors.status504: The model service timed out (504) after retrying.
workspaceErrors.status524: The model service timed out (524) after retrying.
workspaceErrors.htmlResponse: The model service returned an unexpected web page. Try again later.
workspaceErrors.unknown: An unknown workspace task error occurred

workspace.projectMemoryCounts: {{requirements}} requirements · {{decisions}} decisions · {{rules}} rules · {{openItems}} open items · {{risks}} risks
workspace.folderConflict: This folder is already authorized for “{{conversation}}”. Unlink it there first.
workspace.bindFailed: Could not authorize the workspace folder
workspace.unbindFailed: Could not unlink the workspace folder
workspace.approvalDescription: This setting applies only to the current conversation and can be changed above the chat at any time.
workspace.approvalAskDescription: Confirm each file change, generated file, move, or temporary script.
workspace.approvalAutoDescription: Built-in tools and read-only scripts run automatically; generic scripts that may modify files ask first.
workspace.approvalFullDescription: Tools and scripts run automatically inside this folder. Network, system commands, and outside paths remain blocked.
workspace.operationWriteAccess: This operation can read and modify files inside the current workspace.
workspace.operationReadAccess: This operation only needs to read files inside the current workspace.
workspace.operationBoundary: It cannot access the network, run system commands, or leave the workspace.
workspace.readingContext: Reading the message, attachments, and conversation context...
workspace.revealHint: Click to show in the system file manager

localTask.title: Local file task
localTask.safetyDescription: Original files are never overwritten. Results are saved in “{{directory}}” beside the source files and verified by actual byte size.
localTask.someNeedOtherMethod: Some files need another processing method
localTask.prepareFailed: Could not prepare the local file task

actions.copy: Already within target; copy to results

quickChat.copyFailed: Copy failed. Select and copy the text manually.
quickChat.quotedSelection: Selected text added as context for your next message
quickChat.quotedMessage: Message added as context for your next message
quickChat.configureProviderApiKey: Configure an API key for {{provider}} in the main window
quickChat.clipboardReadFailed: Could not read the clipboard attachment

starters.help: I would like {{name}} to help me with a problem
starters.context: What information should I provide for {{title}}?
starters.plan: Use the {{name}} approach to give me an actionable plan

general.name: General Assistant
general.title: Everyday questions, writing, and analysis
starters: Help me organize a work plan
Explain this concept in simple terms

document.name: Document Assistant
document.title: Summarize, extract, and rewrite
starters: Extract the key conclusions from this document
Turn this into a presentation-ready brief

legal.title: Clause review and risk flags
starters: What should I pay most attention to?
Revise this clause to better protect Party A

code.name: Coding Assistant
code.title: Build, debug, and explain code
starters: Explain the problem in this code

teacher.name: Learning Coach
teacher.title: Explanations, exercises, and tutoring
starters: Explain this concept with an analogy

modelPicker.searchPlaceholder: Search by model name, ID, provider, or capability

reasoning.defaultTitle: Let the model or provider decide for the best compatibility
reasoning.lowTitle: Faster responses for simple questions and rewriting
reasoning.highTitle: Use more reasoning for complex analysis and coding

theme.title: Appearance
theme.description: Use the same color theme across the main window, Quick Chat, and content components.
theme.eligibilityHint: Checks the share of usage through the official G-LLM service when selected

timeZone.title: Conversation time zone
timeZone.description: Controls message timestamps; follow this device or choose a time zone manually.

sendShortcut.title: Send messages with
sendShortcut.description: Applies to the main and quick chat composers. Enter confirms text while an input method is composing.
sendShortcut.enterDescription: Best for short messages and quick questions. Use Shift + Enter for a new line.
sendShortcut.ctrlEnterDescription: Best for longer writing. Enter inserts a new line; Command + Enter also works on macOS.

storage.title: Data storage location
storage.description: Conversations, assistants, local knowledge, long-term memory, and provider settings are stored on this device.
storage.pendingDescription: The data folder changed. Restart G-LLM to apply it.
storage.archiveDescription: Export local data to a ZIP archive or restore from one. G-LLM creates a backup before importing.
storage.confirmChoose: G-LLM will choose a new data folder and copy the current conversations, assistants, local knowledge, long-term memory, and provider settings into it. The change takes effect after restart, and the old folder remains as a backup. Continue?
storage.confirmReset: G-LLM will copy the current data back to the default folder and restore the system default location. The change takes effect after restart, and the current folder will not be deleted automatically. Continue?
storage.confirmImport: Importing a ZIP archive first backs up the current data and then replaces it with the archive. Restart G-LLM after the import to apply it. Continue?
storage.importBackup: {{message}} Current data was backed up to: {{path}}
storage.confirmRecoverRestart:
{{message}}

Restart G-LLM now and load this data folder?

about.description: G-LLM gives individuals and organizations multiple assistants and conversations, flexible model providers, local knowledge, and long-term memory. Data stays on your device by default, and you can change the storage folder for backup, migration, or private deployment.
about.updateCheckFailed: Could not check for updates. Try again later.
about.licenseSummary: Since V1.1.0, individuals and organizations may use G-LLM internally at no cost. V{{version}} converts to AGPL-3.0-only on July 14, 2030.
about.legalOpenFailed: Could not open the legal document. Check that the installation is complete.
about.telemetryDescription: Enabled by default to measure installs, activity, version distribution, and basic feature trends. It never uploads conversations, API keys, attachments, or local knowledge.
about.telemetryDisabledDescription: When disabled, the client stops sending anonymous usage analytics and saves that preference locally.
about.lifecycleDescription: On Windows, closing the main window hides it to the system tray, and minimizing shows the floating logo. Use this button, the tray menu, or the floating logo menu to quit.
about.confirmQuit: Quit G-LLM? Closing the main window only hides it to the tray, and minimizing shows the floating logo. Quitting closes the main window, quick chat, and floating logo.

provider.apiKeyIntro: Add an API key to get started. The default gateway is https://llm.gprophet.com/v1.
provider.globalHint: The selected provider becomes the global default.
provider.name: Provider name
provider.enterApiKeyLater: Enter your API key now or add it later
provider.defaultModelHint: Select any model below to make it the default without relying only on the dropdown.
provider.capabilitiesHint: Capabilities are inferred from the provider model list and model ID to determine chat, vision, and image generation support.
provider.manualAddHint: Use this only when the provider cannot return its model list or the model is not listed yet.
provider.modelIdPlaceholder: Enter a model ID, such as gpt-5.5
provider.temperatureHint: When disabled, use the model's default sampling settings
provider.maxTokensHint: Limit the maximum number of tokens in one response
provider.searchPlaceholder: Search providers, such as OpenAI, Kimi, or Ollama
provider.addNote: After adding it, you can fetch models, test the connection, and select the global default model in provider settings.
provider.added: Added “{{provider}}”. You can fetch models and test the connection; save to make it the global default.
provider.defaultSelected: Selected {{model}} as the global default. Save to apply.
provider.confirmDelete: Delete provider “{{provider}}”? The default G-LLM provider will not be affected.
provider.goldCheckFailed: Could not verify Gold theme eligibility

together.name: Together AI
together.description: Hosted open models with a compatible API

agreement.title: Terms of Use
agreement.intro: Welcome to G-LLM, a local AI client for connecting model services and managing assistants, conversations, attachments, a local knowledge base, and long-term memory.
agreement.localData: Your conversations, assistant settings, local knowledge base, long-term memory, and provider settings are stored on this device by default. Back up important data and keep API keys secure.
agreement.recoverHint: If you reinstalled your system, moved the app, or already have a backed-up G-LLM data directory, select it and restart the app to restore your data.
agreement.modelService: Messages, extracted attachment content, and required context are sent to the model provider you select. Each provider processes data under its own terms.
agreement.responsibility: AI output may contain errors, omissions, or outdated information. Consult qualified professionals or authoritative sources for medical, legal, investment, engineering, and other high-risk decisions.
agreement.telemetry: Anonymous analytics are enabled by default to understand version activity, feature usage, and error categories. They do not collect conversations, API keys, uploaded file content, or knowledge base content, and can be disabled in settings.
agreement.recover: I already have a data directory

errors.modelTimeout: The model service timed out. Please try again.
errors.modelBusy: The model service is busy. Please try again shortly.
errors.modelUnavailable: The model service is temporarily unavailable.
errors.modelAbnormal: The model service returned an unexpected response. Please try again.

storage.pathOverlap: The data folder cannot be a parent or child of the current data folder. Choose a separate folder.
storage.insideApp: The data folder cannot be inside the application folder. Choose a separate writable folder.
storage.programFiles: The data folder cannot be inside Program Files because standard users may not be able to write there.
storage.generatedImagePathInvalid: The generated image path is invalid
storage.alreadyUsingDirectory: G-LLM is already using this data folder.
storage.directoryChanged: Current data was copied to the new folder. Restart G-LLM to apply it.
storage.noExistingData: No G-LLM data was found in that folder. Choose a previous backup or migrated data folder.
storage.existingDirectoryAdopted: G-LLM will use the existing data folder after restart.
storage.alreadyUsingDefault: G-LLM is already using the default data folder.
storage.defaultRestored: Current data was copied back to the default folder. Restart G-LLM to apply it.
storage.unsafeArchivePath: The archive contains an unsafe path: {{path}}
storage.archivePathOutside: The archive contains a path outside the data folder: {{path}}
storage.emptyArchive: The archive contains no importable G-LLM data files.
storage.imported: Imported {{count}} data file(s). Restart G-LLM to apply them.

theme.eligible: Gold theme unlocked: {{summary}} used the official G-LLM service
theme.noUsage: Gold theme is not available yet: there is no model usage history, and official G-LLM usage must exceed 50%
theme.notEligible: Gold theme is not available yet: official G-LLM usage is {{summary}} and must exceed 50%

provider.apiKeyRequired: Add an API key for “{{provider}}” first

assistant.fallbackSystemPrompt: You are the G-LLM {{keyword}} assistant. Clarify the user's goal first, then provide a conclusion, supporting rationale, and next actions. Respond in the user's current language unless explicitly asked otherwise. Be clear, actionable, and verifiable. For high-risk topics, state your limitations and recommend consulting a qualified professional or authoritative source. Provide checklists and acceptance criteria when useful.
assistant.starterPlan: Turn the following into an actionable {{keyword}} plan

update.unavailable: The latest version information is temporarily unavailable. Check the download page manually.
update.latest: You are using the latest version, V{{version}}
update.localizedNotesUnavailable: English release notes are not available for this version yet. Open the download page to view the original changelog.

chat.maxTokensAdvice: The current maximum output is {{tokens}} tokens. Try increasing it.
chat.noMaxTokensAdvice: No maximum output token limit is configured. Enable and increase it in settings.
chat.truncated: The model reached the upstream length limit{{reason}}, so this response may be incomplete. {{advice}}

floating.requestFailed: That request did not succeed. Click me to return and retry.
floating.idle1: I am here whenever you want to start a conversation.
floating.idle2: Have a new idea? We can shape it together.
floating.idle3: Bring me a document, image, or code problem.
floating.idle4: Stuck on something? Click me and we will work through it.
floating.idle5: Finished a stretch of work? Take a moment to move around.

localTask.tooManyDuplicates: The output folder contains too many files with the same name. Organize it and try again.
localTask.notLocalAttachment: This attachment was not added with the local file picker and cannot be processed locally.
localTask.pdfRebuildWarning: The PDF will be compressed by rebuilding pages as images. Searchable text, links, forms, or digital signatures may be lost. The original file is not modified.
localTask.unsupportedWarning: This file type cannot be compressed safely in the current version. G-LLM will not modify it or report a false result.
localTask.selectFile: Select at least one local file first
localTask.imageTargetFailed: The image could not reach the target size within the minimum safe quality range
localTask.pdfTooLong: This PDF has more than 100 pages and is not compressed automatically to avoid excessive memory use
localTask.pdfTargetFailed: The PDF could not reach the target size at an acceptable page quality. Split it and upload the parts separately.
localTask.planExpired: The task plan expired. Create a new plan.
localTask.noProcessableFile: No processable local file was found
localTask.outputTooLarge: The output file is still over the limit
localTask.outputExpired: The task output folder is no longer available

workspace.status429: The model service is busy (429). Try again later.
workspace.status502: The model gateway cannot reach the upstream service (502)
workspace.status503: The model service is temporarily unavailable (503)
workspace.status5xx: The model service has a temporary failure ({{status}})
workspace.readFolderFailed: Could not read the workspace folder
workspace.completeFallbackDetail: Files were generated and verified; the final summary did not respond, so local results completed the task
workspace.completeDetail: Files were generated, verified, and organized locally
workspace.completeFallbackNote: The final summary did not respond, but the files above are unaffected.
workspace.retryFailed: The request still failed after automatic retries
workspace.noModelResponse: The model returned no usable response
workspace.maxSteps: This workspace task reached its maximum number of steps. Review the current result before continuing.
workspace.alreadyRunning: A workspace task is already running in this conversation
workspace.folderBusy: Another conversation is using this workspace folder. Wait for it to finish and try again.
